post.summary: Create new profile import for a user.
post.description:
This will start an async operation.
- If the operation is started successfully, the response will be `202 Accepted` and the `Location` header will contain the URL to get the status of the operation.
- If the operation is not started successfully, the response will be `400 Bad Request`

get.summary: Get current status of the async profile import operation.
get.description:
This will return the status of an async operation.
- If the operation is still in progress, the response will be `202 Accepted`
- If the operation is completed successfully, the response will be `200 OK` and the `status` property will be `Completed`
- If the operation is completed with errors, the response will be `200 OK` and the `status` property will be `Failed`

post.description:
Sample request:
            
    POST /v0.1/companies/1/projects/search
    {
         "title": "string",
         "pipelines": [0],
         "projectStates": [0],
         "PageAndSortBy": {
                 "SortBy": "0",
                 "SortOrder": "1",
                 "Page": "1",
                 "ItemsPerPage": "15"
         },
         "internalId": "string",
         "externalId": "string",
         "corporateIdentityNumber": "string",
         "customerId": 0,
         "salesManagers": [0],
         "customers": [0],
         "intermediators": [0],
         "estimatedCloseDate": {
             "From":"2020-03-01 17:00:01.5822352",
             "To":"2029-03-01 17:00:01.5822352"
         },
         "lastTouchDate": {
             "From":"2020-03-01 17:00:01.5822352",
             "To":"2029-03-01 17:00:01.5822352"
         },
         "createdDate": {
             "From":"2020-03-01 17:00:01.5822352",
             "To":"2029-03-01 17:00:01.5822352"
         },
         "projectManagers": [0],
         "tags": [0],
         "tagOperator": 0,
         "teams": [0],
         "deliveryTeams": [0]
    }

SortBy Parameter can be:
- CreatedDateTime=0 // Default
- Title=1
- SeoId=4
- UpdatedDateTime=5
- LastTouchDateTime=6
- InternalId=7
- ExternalId=8
            
tagOperator is used to determine how the tags filter should be applied:
- Set tagOperator to 0 of you want the tags filter to filter on projects that have ANY of the selected tags
- Set tagOperator to 1 of you want the tags filter to filter on projects that have ALL of the selected tags

startDate.description: The start date of the work experience. We will convert any date to the first day of the month, so only the month and year are relevant. For example, if you input "2026-03-15", it will be stored as "2026-03-01". This allows us to maintain consistency in how we handle work experience dates, as we only care about the month and year for this information.

endDate.description: The end date of the work experience. We will convert any date to the last day of the month, so only the month and year are relevant. For example, if you input "2026-03-15", it will be stored as "2026-03-31".
